1.`32.*s] + 1/Sqrt[4.`32. - 1.`32.*t] + 1/Sqrt[4.`32. - 1.`32.*u]) + 9.9645716325491403465193818545696848889513225304036611417342`32.*^-19*((4.`32. - 1.`32.*s)^(-1/4) + (4.`32. - 1.`32.*t)^(-1/4) + (4.`32. -
